case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. TONI KNOX et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RENTAL AGREEMENT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX, TONI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNOX, TONI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1402 A STURGEON ST. S.F. CA. 94130, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( NO COPY )

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX, TONI
